name: Desert Plant Observation
description: Talk to Ranger Nita, observe three different desert plants, record each observation in the journal, and report back.

steps.description: Talk to Ranger Nita at the trail edge and learn how to observe without disturbing plants.
Observe any three different Sonoran Desert plants.
Describe each plant observation in the journal before explaining it.
Return to Ranger Nita and share the observations.

success_dialogue: Those are careful notes, Zuzu. You noticed structure before jumping to answers, and that is how field science begins.
reward_text: You earned 25 ZuzuBucks, 6 reputation, and the Naturalist badge.
